sections.tldr: TL;DR: Galgotias University Online MBA at a glance. UGC-DEB approved. 2 years (4 semesters). Rs 76,200 total fee. NIRF #101, NAAC A+. 7 specialisations. Best for budget-conscious professionals seeking NAAC A+, WES recognition at under Rs 85,000 total fee.

about.body: Galgotias University was established in 2011 in Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh. It holds NAAC A+ accreditation and WES recognition, with the online division operating under UGC-DEB entitlement. EdifyEdu verifies these figures independently. We do not take commission from Galgotias University Online. The online MBA runs with a structured thesis model: students begin the Master Thesis in Semester 3 and complete it in Semester 4. This makes it a research-aware programme, not purely a taught MBA. At Rs 76,200 total, it is the most affordable NAAC A+ online MBA in this batch. The programme primarily targets professionals in the Delhi-NCR region who want a cost-effective credential with credible accreditation.

approvals.body: Galgotias University holds NAAC A+ accreditation (naac.gov.in). The online MBA is offered under UGC-DEB entitlement (deb.ugc.ac.in). AICTE approval and WES recognition are confirmed. NIRF ranking for Galgotias overall sits at 101+; the management programme is ranked in the 101-150 band. Graduates hold PSU-eligible status under UGC guidelines. Verify all approval data at the respective official portals before enrolling.

ugcDeb.body: The UGC Distance Education Bureau (UGC-DEB) regulates all online degree programmes in India. Galgotias University Online appears on the UGC-DEB entitled institutions list at deb.ugc.ac.in. This entitlement means the degree is valid for government jobs at the central and state level; graduates can apply for higher education (M.Phil, PhD) at recognised Indian universities; and PSU recruitment boards accept the degree under current UGC guidelines. UGC-DEB entitlement is reviewed periodically. Always cross-check your admission year's approved list at deb.ugc.ac.in before enrolling. A programme not listed at the time of your admission does not carry these protections, regardless of what the university website states.

whoCanApply.body: The minimum eligibility for the Galgotias University Online online MBA is: Graduation with 50% marks from a recognised university. There is no age limit for online MBA admission under UGC-DEB guidelines, which makes this programme accessible to working professionals at any career stage. Candidates with a pass class (below 50%) in graduation should contact the university admissions team to check for SC/ST or OBC relaxation norms applicable for the current intake. Work experience is generally not mandatory for this programme, though having professional experience will help you apply learnings more effectively. International students and NRIs are eligible to apply, subject to document verification requirements. No entrance exam is required; admission is based on graduation percentage and document verification. Creating your Academic Bank of Credits (ABC) ID at abc.gov.in before applying will speed up the admission process.

classes.body: Galgotias University Online delivers the MBA entirely online with no mandatory campus visit. Live online sessions scheduled around working hours; thesis supervision is conducted via portal interactions and video calls with assigned guides. Study materials are uploaded at the start of each semester. Students interact with faculty through scheduled doubt-clearing sessions and course discussion boards. The programme is designed for full-time working adults: live sessions are scheduled on weekends or evenings. Assignment deadlines are fixed for each semester but students can manage their daily study schedule independently within those windows.

exams.body: All examinations for the Galgotias University Online online MBA are conducted online in a proctored format. Students must have a functioning webcam, valid government-issued photo ID, and a stable internet connection for exam sessions. Evaluation typically includes continuous assessment through assignments, quizzes, and participation, contributing 30-40% of the grade. Semester-end examinations contribute 60-70% of the grade. The final semester includes a project or capstone component that counts toward the final evaluation. Proctoring software flags unusual behaviour during exams, so ensure your environment is quiet and controlled during exam windows. Keep Aadhaar as your primary identity document for exam day, as some proctoring platforms have rejected Voter ID in the past.

specializationsOverview.body: Galgotias University Online offers 7 MBA specialisations: Business Analytics, Finance Management, HR Management, Healthcare Management, International Business Management, Marketing Management, Operations Management. Students select their specialisation at the time of admission. Semesters 1 and 2 cover a shared core curriculum across all specialisations. Specialisation-specific subjects begin from Semester 3. For detailed elective subject lists for each track, visit /universities/galgotias-university-online/mba/[spec-slug] on this site. Specialisation availability may vary by intake cycle. Confirm your chosen track is active for your intake before paying any fees.

syllabusNote.body:
SEMESTER 1: Foundation Subjects (All Specialisations)
- Marketing Management: Covers market analysis, product strategy, pricing, and distribution channel decisions.
- Accounting for Managers: Covers financial accounting basics, journal entries, and management-oriented financial analysis.
- Business Statistics: Introduces statistical methods for business data analysis and reporting.
- Legal Aspects: Introduces business law, contracts, and regulatory frameworks relevant to Indian managers.
- Managerial Economics: Applies microeconomic and macroeconomic concepts to managerial planning problems.

SEMESTER 2: Core Management Subjects (All Specialisations)
- Business Analytics: Introduces data analysis tools, visualisation platforms, and analytics for business use.
- Corporate Finance: Covers capital budgeting, cost of capital, and corporate financial strategy decisions.
- HRM: Studies human resource planning, recruitment, appraisal systems, and labour law compliance.
- Research Method: Covers quantitative and qualitative research design and business report writing skills.
- Operations and SCM: Examines production planning, procurement, and end-to-end supply chain management.
- Digital Marketing: Covers SEO, social media, content strategy, and online performance measurement tools.
- Entrepreneurship: Covers business model development, startup finance, and entrepreneurial risk frameworks.

SEMESTER 3: Shared Core and Specialisation Subjects
- Business Communication: Develops professional writing, presentation, and interpersonal communication for managers.
- Strategic Management: Develops frameworks for competitive strategy formulation and corporate-level planning.
- Master Thesis (Initial Phase): Students define research topic, conduct literature review, and prepare the thesis proposal.
- 3 specialisation-specific subjects are added in Semester 3 per chosen track.
Specialisation-specific subjects vary. For electives see /universities/galgotias-university-online/mba/[spec-slug] on this site.

SEMESTER 4: Capstone and Specialisation Completion
- Business Ethics and CSR: Examines ethical decision-making frameworks, CSR reporting, and stakeholder management.
- Master Thesis (Final Phase): Students complete data collection, analysis, and final thesis submission with defence.
- 2 specialisation-specific subjects are added in Semester 4 per chosen track.
Specialisation-specific subjects vary. For electives see /universities/galgotias-university-online/mba/[spec-slug] on this site.

Syllabus applies to 2025-26 admission cycle. Galgotias University Online updates electives each cycle. Reconfirm current syllabus with our counsellor before enrolment.

fees.body: The total fee for the Galgotias University Online online MBA is approximately Rs 76,200. This is typically paid in four semester instalments of Rs 19,050 each. Additional charges may include registration fee, exam fee per semester, and alumni association fee. Fee breakdown: Total: Rs 76,200; Yearly: Rs 33,000; Exam fee: Rs 4,000/year; Reg fee: Rs 1,200; Alumni fee: Rs 1,000. Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Galgotias University Online each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees with our counsellor before any payment.

coupon.body: Galgotias University Online offers need-based and merit-based scholarships for eligible students. Defence personnel, government employees, and alumni of group institutions may receive fee concessions. Early payment discounts may apply at the time of registration for some intake cycles. Check the university's official portal for current scholarship notifications before applying. We do not apply exclusive coupon codes or take referral commissions from any university.

emi.body: EMI options for the Galgotias University Online online MBA start from Rs 2500 per month through partner banking institutions. Most students spread the total fee across 12-24 monthly instalments. No-cost EMI (zero interest) may be available via specific credit cards or NBFC partners. Debit card EMI and NACH-based auto-debit are also accepted at most universities. Confirm the current EMI partners and interest rates with the university finance team before selecting a plan. Our counsellor can connect you with the admissions team to confirm EMI eligibility for your chosen payment method.

sampleCert.body: Graduates of the Galgotias University Online online MBA receive a degree certificate issued by Galgotias University Online under UGC-DEB guidelines. The certificate reads 'Master of Business Administration' without the word 'online' printed on the face of the document. This is consistent with UGC-DEB norms for all entitled institutions. DigiLocker integration allows digital verification of the degree for employer background checks. A consolidated mark sheet covering all four semesters is issued alongside the degree. Physical certificates are dispatched after convocation. Allow 4-8 weeks from result declaration for physical delivery to your registered address.

admission.body: Step 1: Visit the official admissions portal at https://galgotiasonline.edu.in/online-mba-programs-india.php. Step 2: Register with your email address and mobile number. Step 3: Fill the application form and select your preferred specialisation. Step 4: Upload required documents: graduation mark sheets, degree certificate, government photo ID, and a passport-size photograph. Step 5: Pay the registration fee (Rs 500-1,200 depending on the university and intake). Step 6: Receive the offer letter and confirm admission by paying the first semester fee. Most universities run two admission windows per year: January and July intakes. Confirm the current intake deadline with the university before applying.

abcId.body: The National Academic Depository's Academic Bank of Credits (ABC) is mandatory for online programme enrolment at UGC-DEB entitled universities. Create your ABC ID at abc.gov.in before completing admission at Galgotias University Online. The ABC ID links your academic credits to a national database and enables credit transfer between institutions in future. The process takes 5-10 minutes with your Aadhaar number and registered mobile number. Have your ABC ID number ready during the application process as Galgotias University Online will require it at the time of admission confirmation.

placements.body: Galgotias University Online provides career support through resume clinics, mock interviews, and virtual job fair access. The mandatory thesis project across Semesters 3 and 4 creates a portfolio piece that can differentiate candidates in management interviews. WES recognition helps with international job applications and credential verification. Placement support at online MBA level means career assistance. Galgotias does not guarantee placement for online MBA students. Delhi-NCR proximity is an advantage for professionals targeting roles in that job market post-graduation.

topHirers.body: Organisations that have recruited from Galgotias University Online's broader alumni base include: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, Cognizant, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Amazon, Flipkart, Deloitte, EY, L&T, and others. These names reflect historical placement data for the university and are not guarantees for online MBA students specifically. Actual hiring from an online MBA depends on your work experience, specialisation choice, and the quality of your profile at the time of applying. We do not publish placement statistics we cannot verify from official sources or verified alumni accounts.

beyondAdmission.body: EdifyEdu compares public UGC/NAAC/NIRF data with no paid rankings and no commissions from any university. After reading this page, you can: compare Galgotias University Online side-by-side with other universities at /compare; read the detailed specialisation syllabus pages at /universities/galgotias-university-online/mba/[spec-slug]; or book a free counsellor call at /contact to clarify fee, scholarship, and admission timeline questions. Our counsellors do not push you toward any specific university. If you are weighing two or three options, the compare tool lets you place them side by side on fee, NIRF, NAAC, and specialisation count.

comparisons.body:
Galgotias University Online: NIRF #101, NAAC A+, Rs 76,200, 7 specialisations.
Chandigarh University Online: NIRF #19, NAAC A+, Rs 1,65,000, 23 specialisations.

Galgotias University Online: NIRF #101, NAAC A+, Rs 76,200, 7 specialisations.
SMU Online: NIRF unranked, NAAC A+, Rs 1,20,000, 6 specialisations.

Use the compare tool at /compare to place these universities side by side on all metrics before deciding. The right choice depends on your NIRF requirement, budget, specialisation preference, and career sector.

honestVerdict.body:
This verdict is based on publicly available data from UGC-DEB, NAAC, and NIRF portals, cross-referenced with student feedback from verified sources.

Choose this if:
- Budget ceiling is Rs 90,000 total and NAAC A+ is non-negotiable
- WES recognition matters for future international opportunities
- You want a thesis-based programme with structured research output
- Greater Noida location matters for Delhi-NCR alumni networking

Look elsewhere if:
- NIRF top-50 ranking matters for your target employer or PSU application
- You need more than 7 specialisation options
- You want global certifications included in the programme
- Your employer requires NAAC A++ specifically

The decision between two similarly accredited programmes often comes down to three factors: the specialisation you need, the placement network that matters for your target industry, and the fee your budget can absorb without strain. Use the /compare tool to map your shortlist on these three axes. If you are still undecided, our counsellor call is free. Visit /contact and we will compare your shortlisted options against your specific career goal and budget without sales pressure.

items.name: Mohit A.
items.liked: Rs 76,200 for a NAAC A+, WES-recognised MBA is unbeatable value. The thesis model forced me to do real research, which improved my analytical thinking significantly. Faculty for Strategic Management was strong. The programme does exactly what it says on the tin.
items.body: Rs 76,200 for a NAAC A+, WES-recognised MBA is unbeatable value. The thesis model forced me to do real research, which improved my analytical thinking significantly. Faculty for Strategic Management was strong. The programme does exactly what it says on the tin.

items.name: Simran K.
items.liked: I compared 10 universities and Galgotias won on fee-to-credential ratio. The thesis process was rigorous, which I appreciated. The LMS was slow during Semester 2 assignment submission windows. It crashed once the night before a deadline, which caused unnecessary stress for the whole cohort.
items.body: I compared 10 universities and Galgotias won on fee-to-credential ratio. The thesis process was rigorous, which I appreciated. The LMS was slow during Semester 2 assignment submission windows. It crashed once the night before a deadline, which caused unnecessary stress for the whole cohort.

items.name: Rajan P.
items.liked: WES recognition was a deciding factor because I plan to apply for jobs abroad. Programme content is standard but competent. The peer group was smaller than expected, around 40 students in my batch. More structured peer interaction would have enriched the experience.
items.body: WES recognition was a deciding factor because I plan to apply for jobs abroad. Programme content is standard but competent. The peer group was smaller than expected, around 40 students in my batch. More structured peer interaction would have enriched the experience.

items.name: Kavita D.
items.liked: The fee is the programme's biggest strength. The content is adequate. Career services did not extend to placement facilitation for online students in any structured way. Resume review was provided but that was the extent of career support available.
items.body: The fee is the programme's biggest strength. The content is adequate. Career services did not extend to placement facilitation for online students in any structured way. Resume review was provided but that was the extent of career support available.

items.name: Aditya R.
items.liked: The thesis submission portal had technical issues in Semester 4 that caused delays for several students, including me. The university resolved it after repeated follow-up. For an all-online programme, the digital infrastructure needs investment. Reviews aggregated from verified enrolled students and public sources including Trustpilot and Reddit r/indianeducation.
items.body: The thesis submission portal had technical issues in Semester 4 that caused delays for several students, including me. The university resolved it after repeated follow-up. For an all-online programme, the digital infrastructure needs investment. Reviews aggregated from verified enrolled students and public sources including Trustpilot and Reddit r/indianeducation.

reviews.closer: Reviews aggregated from verified enrolled students and public sources including Trustpilot and Reddit r/indianeducation.

flags.sentence1: NIRF rank of 101+ in management is a material limitation if your target PSU or employer has a NIRF top-50 filter for postgraduate eligibility.
flags.sentence2: Check your employer's specific NIRF requirement before choosing Galgotias.

flags.sentence1: The LMS has shown instability during assignment submission windows.
flags.sentence2: Submit all assignments at least 24 hours before the deadline to avoid losing work due to platform failures.

flags.sentence1: The thesis project is a genuine academic commitment, not a rubber-stamp exercise.
flags.sentence2: Students who expected a light Semester 3 and 4 workload found the thesis demanding alongside full-time employment commitments.

flags.sentence1: Career services are basic and do not include structured placement for online MBA students.
flags.sentence2: Galgotias is a budget-first choice; invest your own time in networking and job searching beyond the university's career support.
